creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 243868
Transcript: mdocml not installed – doing so would have removed too many packages

<https://www.freshports.org/textproc/groff/#conflicts> lists heirloom-doctools and ja-groff but not mdocml. 

From the attached file: 

- mdocml-1.14.6 [FreeBSD] conflicts with groff-1.22.4_4 [installed] on /usr/local/bin/soelim
